articles.title: A company owned by a friend of Orbán transported money intended for Ukraine through Hungary for years, and this was no secret to the authorities
articles.description: Since the outbreak of the war, a huge amount of money has passed through Hungary to Ukraine. This happened on a weekly basis, and sometimes even more often. The authorities were well aware of this, as one of the country's leading companies is a major player in the sector. Now, this could all come...
